# Code Anchors: Bare-Name Guard

- `libs/workspace/src/bare-name.ts` — the shared workspace path-safety definition: the bare-segment check (rejects path separators and lone traversal tokens) imported by both the manifest and pointer sides, plus the companion repo-relative-path check that guards the hub's docs-root override (allows multi-segment paths and the repo root, rejects absolute paths and traversal escapes).
- `libs/workspace/src/bare-name.spec.ts` — accepted names (including embedded dots) versus rejected separators and traversal tokens, and the companion repo-relative-path rule across its accept/reject cases.
